title: Master of Technology in Computer Science Engineering (Data Science) - For Working Professionals Only
content: The Master of Technology in CSE- Data Science program for Working Professionals at the School of Computer Science & Engineering is specially designed to cater to the academic advancement of individuals already engaged in full-time employment in the technical or engineering sector. Recognized by regulatory bodies and aligned with UGC guidelines, the program enables working professionals to pursue a master degree without interrupting their current career paths. The program follows a weekend schedule (Saturday & Sunday) along with few evening classes, making it flexible and accessible. The Master of Technology in CSE–Data Science at the School of Computer Science & Engineering is a two-year, full-time postgraduate program focused on equipping students with the analytical, computational, and technological skills required to extract meaningful insights from data. This learner-centric, industry-aligned, and research-driven program fosters critical thinking and innovation through a rigorous blend of theory and hands-on learning. The curriculum integrates foundational computer science courses with specialized electives in data science, along with a significant project or dissertation component. Students gain practical exposure to data handling, statistical analysis, machine learning, data visualization, and big data technologies, preparing them to solve real-world problems using data-driven approaches. Designed for aspiring data scientists, engineers, and researchers, this program offers a robust pathway for graduates to advance their careers in data-intensive industries, research organizations, and academia, contributing to the growing demand for skilled professionals in the data science domain. B.E/B.Tech with minimum 50% marks or equivalent in CGPA in Computer Science/Information Technology or MCA with minimum of ONE Year Full time / Regular working Experience. 01 An ability to independently carry out research /investigation and development work to solve practical problems. 02 An ability to write and present a substantial technical report/document. 03 Students should be able to demonstrate a degree of mastery over the area as per the specialization of the program. The mastery should be at a level higher than the requirements in the appropriate bachelor program: 01 The Post Graduates of Computer Science and Engineering shall be able to successfully pursue doctoral research in Computer Science, Engineering and allied disciplines at institutions of transnational reputation. 02 The Post Graduates of Computer Science and Engineering shall serve in technical or managerial roles at Government firms, Corporates and contributing to the society as successful entrepreneurs through startup. 03 The Post Graduates of Computer Science and Engineering shall be engaged with leading Global Software Product development companies, Research & Consultancy organizations and academic Institutions. 01 Have the ability to work with emerging technologies in computing requisite to Industry 4.0. 02 Demonstrate Engineering Practice learned through industry internship and research project to solve live problems in various domains.
